item.title: Oh my I wonder, and let me be clear
item.description:
Oh my I wonder, and let me be clear. I have no doubt that they make material genuine impacts on peoples lives … but if we aren’t critical of those power we lose all of our own, and my God there are things to be critical of them for (the comments are about be “social democrat not sound like a liberal challenge: Level 1 Trillion”) and btw the Bernie quote aint much better with context.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: calebhammerlive did a whole video “responding” to me pointing out he is pushing a right wing narrative, and goes so far as to fl...
item.description:
calebhammerlive did a whole video “responding” to me pointing out he is pushing a right wing narrative, and goes so far as to flagrantly lie about what’s said in a publically available video by me to defend himself. To his over 3 million followers. If you are gonna punch down like that at least make it land buddy. - so I’ll say it again, his editorial choices push a particular narrative, and he is way to politically incompetent to even defend from that allegation.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It’s almost like it was never about that
item.description:
It’s almost like it was never about that



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is why I listen to right-wingers so much because they are often honest because they have to rally up their base to do the v...
item.description:
This is why I listen to right-wingers so much because they are often honest because they have to rally up their base to do the violence that liberals tend to deny



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.description:
calebhammerlive did a whole video “responding” to me pointing out he is pushing a right wing narrative, and goes so far as to flagrantly lie about what’s said in a publically available video by me to defend himself. To his over 3 million followers. If you are gonna punch down like that at least make it land buddy. - so I’ll say it again, his editorial choices push a particular narrative, and he is way to politically incompetent to even defend from that allegation.
